definitions.text: To encircle something or simultaneously extend in all directions.
To enclose or confine something on all sides so as to prevent escape.
examples: The lions surrounded the deer herd so they had no way to escape.
They surrounded each other in the classroom and started trading hits.

definitions.text: To pass around; to travel about; to circumnavigate.
Anything, such as a fence or border, that surrounds something.
